steps.expected: Dashboard loads with μ lane visible
steps.observed: Dashboard loaded, μ (Local Reach) lane visible with emerald accent

steps.action: Inspect thread cards in μ lane
steps.expected: Thread cards display proximity and leverage indicators
steps.observed: All 5 thread cards display 'PROXIMITY moderate', 'LEVERAGE medium leverage', 'TIME act within days' badges
Leverage bar at 53% (52.5% fill width) on 4 cards, 48% (47.5%) on 1 card

steps.expected: data-testid attributes for proximity, leverage, time indicators
steps.observed: Found data-testid='mu-indicator-proximity' with label 'Proximity' value 'moderate', data-testid='mu-indicator-leverage' with label 'Leverage' value 'medium leverage', data-testid='mu-indicator-time' with label 'Time' value 'act within days'

evidence.domInspection: All 5 thread cards have mu-indicator elements with correct data-testid attributes: mu-indicator-proximity (value='moderate'), mu-indicator-leverage (value='medium leverage'), mu-indicator-time (value='act within days'). Leverage bar uses mu-leverage-bar with fill width of 52.5%/47.5%.

steps.action: Inspect thread cards for action suggestions
steps.expected: Each thread card contains ≥ 2 action items
steps.observed: All 5 thread cards contain 3 action suggestions each
Actions: '→ Monitor AI model releases', '→ Review compute resource impact', '→ Assess local AI adoption opportunities'
Each card has data-testid='mu-action-suggestions' containing <ul class='mu-action-suggestions-list'> with 3 <li class='mu-action-suggestion-item'> elements

steps.action: Screenshot with tall viewport showing full cards
steps.expected: Suggested Actions section visible within thread cards
steps.observed: Full-page tall-viewport screenshot shows 'SUGGESTED ACTIONS' label with 3 arrow-prefixed action items inside each card

evidence.domInspection: All 5 thread cards contain data-testid='mu-action-suggestions' with 3 mu-action-suggestion-item elements each. Action texts are: 'Monitor AI model releases', 'Review compute resource impact', 'Assess local AI adoption opportunities'. Actions are derived from thread domain_tags (ai, open-source, deployment, etc.).

steps.action: Verify backend has technology-category radar with local signals
steps.expected: Radar with category 'technology' exists with threads
steps.observed: Radar 'Open Source AI Community' (category=technology, id=7caa6d82-...) has 5 threads with domain_tags like ['ai','open-source','deployment']

steps.action: Verify signals normalized and clustered into threads
steps.expected: Threads exist with signal references and domain tags
steps.observed: 5 threads: 'Llama / Release / Enables / Local' (tags: ai, open-source, deployment), 'Training / Analysis / Electricity / Costs' (tags: ai, energy, training), 'Evaluation / Framework / Released / Provides' (tags: ai, safety, open-source), 'Cloud / Spot / Pricing / Dropped' (tags: ai, infrastructure, community), 'Open / Source / Organizing / Response' (tags: ai, regulation, community)

steps.action: Verify threads appear in μ lane (not Π lane)
steps.expected: Technology category routes to μ lane after fix
steps.observed: All 5 threads render in the μ (Local Reach) lane column with emerald green accent. Lane header shows '5 local threads SORTED BY LEVERAGE'

steps.action: Verify proximity and leverage indicators on μ lane cards
steps.expected: Thread cards show leverage and time-to-act indicators
steps.observed: Each card shows PROXIMITY moderate, LEVERAGE medium leverage, TIME act within days, and a leverage bar (48-53%)

steps.action: Verify live snapshot with scoreRanges exists
steps.observed: Live snapshot id=7caa6d82-...:live:... has render_state.deterministicSnapshot with scoreRanges for dimensions: ai, community, deployment, energy, infrastructure, open-source, regulation, safety

evidence.apiResponse: GET /api/radars returns radar 'Open Source AI Community' with category='technology', 5 threads, live snapshot with scoreRanges for 8 dimensions
evidence.domInspection: μ lane renders 5 thread cards from technology radar. Lane header: 'Local Reach — Signals inside your expertise where intervention might matter'. Community Readiness gauges show Awareness 10%, Engagement 40%, Coordination 85%, Resilience 25%.

frictions.description: All 5 thread cards show identical action suggestions ('Monitor AI model releases', 'Review compute resource impact', 'Assess local AI adoption opportunities') regardless of thread-specific domain_tags. The action derivation appears to use a generic template rather than per-thread domain-specific actions.

summary: Tested 3 assertions: 3 passed (VAL-MU-002, VAL-MU-003, VAL-CROSS-012). All μ lane thread cards now display proximity/leverage indicators and action suggestions after the lane-routing.ts and MuThreadCard fixes. Technology category correctly routes to μ lane. One friction noted: action suggestions are identical across all cards rather than thread-specific.
